nasb.text: Jesse was the father of David the king. David was the father of Solomon by Bathsheba who had been the wife of Uriah.

esv.text: and Jesse the father of David the king. And David was the father of Solomon by the wife of Uriah,

cnv.text: 耶西生大衛王。 烏利亞的妻子給大衛生了所羅門，

ccb.text: 耶西生大卫王。 大卫和乌利亚的妻子生所罗门，

csbs.text: 耶西生大卫王。 大卫  与乌利亚的妻子生所罗门，
